channel.title: Supplement Intelligence
channel.description: Evidence-based supplement research with 242 PubMed citations covering 28 Vital Health Global products. Independent analysis by James Foster.

item.title: Complete Guide to V-NEUROKAFE: Nootropic Coffee Research
item.description: Comprehensive evidence-based guide to V-NEUROKAFE nootropic coffee blend. Lion's Mane, L-Theanine, Bacopa Monnieri analysis with 11 peer-reviewed studies.

item.title: Lion's Mane Mushroom: Benefits for Brain Health and Cognition
item.description: In-depth research review of Lion's Mane mushroom (Hericium erinaceus) for nerve growth factor stimulation and cognitive enhancement.

item.title: L-Theanine: The Science of Calm Focus
item.description: Evidence-based guide to L-Theanine for alpha brain wave activity, stress reduction, and caffeine synergy.

item.title: Bacopa Monnieri: Memory and Learning Enhancement
item.description: Research review of Bacopa monnieri for memory consolidation, acetylcholinesterase inhibition, and neuroprotection.

item.title: Complete Guide to V-GLUTATION: Master Antioxidant Analysis
item.description: Evidence-based analysis of V-GLUTATION with reduced glutathione, Vitamin C, and Alpha Lipoic Acid. 4 peer-reviewed studies reviewed.

item.title: Complete Guide to Collagen Complex: Skin, Joint & Bone Health
item.description: Comprehensive guide to multi-type collagen supplementation for skin elasticity, joint support, and bone health.

item.title: Complete Guide to V-OMEGA3: High-Purity Fish Oil Analysis
item.description: Evidence-based analysis of V-OMEGA3 ultra-pure EPA and DHA fish oil for cardiovascular and brain health.

item.title: Complete Guide to V-CURCUMAX: Bioavailable Turmeric Analysis
item.description: Research review of V-CURCUMAX enhanced absorption curcumin for inflammation and joint health.

item.title: Complete Guide to V-DAILY: Comprehensive Multivitamin Analysis
item.description: Evidence-based guide to V-DAILY comprehensive daily multivitamin and mineral formula.

item.title: Complete Guide to V-FORTYFLORA: Probiotic Complex Analysis
item.description: Research review of V-FORTYFLORA multi-strain probiotic for gut health and immune function.

item.title: Complete Guide to V-ASCULAX: Vascular Health Analysis
item.description: Evidence-based analysis of V-ASCULAX for circulation, vein health, and cardiovascular support.

item.title: Complete Guide to V-CONTROL: Blood Sugar Support Analysis
item.description: Research review of V-CONTROL for healthy blood sugar metabolism and insulin sensitivity.

item.title: Complete Guide to V-LOVKAFE: Adaptogen Coffee Analysis
item.description: Evidence-based analysis of V-LOVKAFE adaptogen coffee for libido, mood, and vitality.

item.title: Complete Guide to V-THERMOKAFE: Thermogenic Coffee Analysis
item.description: Research review of V-THERMOKAFE thermogenic coffee for metabolism and weight management.

item.title: Complete Guide to LATTEKAFFE: Collagen Coffee Analysis
item.description: Evidence-based analysis of LATTEKAFFE collagen-infused coffee for skin and joint health.

item.title: Complete Guide to V-NITRO: Pre-Workout Performance Analysis
item.description: Research review of V-NITRO nitric oxide booster for athletic performance and blood flow.

item.title: Complete Guide to V-NRGY: Energy Complex Analysis
item.description: Evidence-based analysis of V-NRGY sustained energy formula for daily vitality.

item.title: Complete Guide to VITALPRO: Complete Protein Analysis
item.description: Research review of VITALPRO complete protein blend for muscle and recovery.

item.title: Complete Guide to PERFORMANCE PLUS: Athletic Performance Analysis
item.description: Evidence-based analysis of PERFORMANCE PLUS for endurance, strength, and recovery.

item.title: Complete Guide to S-BALANCE: Hormone Support Analysis
item.description: Research review of S-BALANCE for women's hormonal health and menstrual comfort.

item.title: Complete Guide to D-FENZ KIDS: Children's Immune Support
item.description: Evidence-based analysis of D-FENZ KIDS immune support formula for children.

item.title: Complete Guide to GENIUS SHAKE KIDS: Children's Brain Nutrition
item.description: Research review of GENIUS SHAKE KIDS for cognitive development and brain nutrition.

item.title: Complete Guide to SMARTBIOTICS KIDS: Children's Probiotics
item.description: Evidence-based analysis of SMARTBIOTICS KIDS probiotic formula for children's gut health.

item.title: Complete Guide to NOURISH PLUS KIDS: Children's Multivitamin
item.description: Research review of NOURISH PLUS KIDS comprehensive children's multivitamin.
